pg33-p1-s3:
Though a robust man at retirement, he went to pieces quickly

pg33-p1:
money could buy was at his disposal. Every attempt failed. Though a robust man at retirement, he went to pieces quickly
and was dead within four years.
pg33-p2-s1: This case contains a powerful lesson.
pg33-p2-s2:
Most of us have believed that if we remained sober for a long stretch, we could
thereafter drink normally.
pg33-p2-s3: But here is a man who at fifty-five years found he was just where he had left off at thirty.
pg33-p2-s4: We have seen the truth demonstrated again and again: "Once an alcoholic, always an alcoholic."
pg33-p2-s5:
Commencing to drink after
a period of sobriety, we are in a short time as bad as ever.
pg33-p2-s6:
If we are planning to stop drinking, there must be no
reservation of any kind, nor any lurking notion that someday we will be immune to alcohol.
pg33-p2:
This case contains a powerful lesson. Most of us have believed that if we remained sober for a long stretch, we could
thereafter drink normally. But here is a man who at fifty-five years found he was just where he had left off at thirty. We have seen the truth demonstrated again and again: "Once an alcoholic, always an alcoholic." Commencing to drink after
a period of sobriety, we are in a short time as bad as ever. If we are planning to stop drinking, there must be no
reservation of any kind, nor any lurking notion that someday we will be immune to alcohol.
pg33-p3-s1: Young people may be encouraged by this man's experience to think that they can stop, as he did, on their own will power.
pg33-p3-s2:
We doubt if many of them can do it, because none will really want to stop, and hardly one of them, because of the
peculiar mental twist already acquired, will find he can win out.
pg33-p3-s3:
Several of our crowd, men of thirty or less, had been
drinking only a few years, but they found themselves as helpless as those who had been drinking twenty years.
pg33-p3:
Young people may be encouraged by this man's experience to think that they can stop, as he did, on their own will power. We doubt if many of them can do it, because none will really want to stop, and hardly one of them, because of the
peculiar mental twist already acquired, will find he can win out. Several of our crowd, men of thirty or less, had been
drinking only a few years, but they found themselves as helpless as those who had been drinking twenty years.
pg33-p4-s1: To be gravely affected, one does not necessarily have to drink a long time nor take the quantities some of us have.
pg33-p4-s2:
This
is particularly true of women.
pg33-p4-s3:
Potential female alcoholics often turn into the real thing and are gone beyond recall in
a few years.
pg33-p4-s4:
Certain drinkers, who would be greatly insulted if called alcoholics, are astonished at their inability to
stop.
pg33-p4-s5: We, who are familiar with the symptoms, see large numbers of potential alcoholics among young
pg33-p4:
To be gravely affected, one does not necessarily have to drink a long time nor take the quantities some of us have. This
is particularly true of women. Potential female alcoholics often turn into the real thing and are gone beyond recall in
a few years. Certain drinkers, who would be greatly insulted if called alcoholics, are astonished at their inability to
stop. We, who are familiar with the symptoms, see large numbers of potential alcoholics among young
